title: dovea tectorum
intro: Dovea tectorum, also known as the rock clematis, is a climbing vine native to tropical Asia. Its medicinal properties lie in its root, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections and reduce inflammation in the body. Dovea tectorum is prepared into herbal preparations such as tea, powder, and extract, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
